title_en: Fever vs Sun Recap — Paint battle and second chances
title_zh: Fever vs Sun 回顾 — 内线对抗与二次进攻
summary_en: Paint points and offensive boards drove second-chance scoring. Fever led in OR%, while Sun’s rotations limited runs.
summary_zh: 禁区得分与前场篮板决定了二次进攻机会。Fever 在 OR% 方面占优，Sun 的协防轮转限制了连续得分。
storyline_en: Opening: early low-post touches set tone.
Mid-game: frequent weak-side help and rotations.
Closing: board battles decided key possessions.
storyline_zh: 开局：低位强攻拉开基调。
中段：弱侧包夹与协防轮转频繁。
收尾：篮板争抢决定每次关键球权。
tactics_en: Low-post isolations: pre-seal and delayed release.
Counter help: collapse baseline then quick expand to perimeter.
tactics_zh: 低位单打：提前卡位 + 出球延迟
反包夹：底线协防后快速外扩
